  • School of Public Policy

People

The School of Public Policy convenes academic expertise from across LSE and beyond, blending academic rigour with real-world relevance to deliver education and research that underpins evidence-based policymaking.

Learn more about our leadership, faculty, teachers, visitors and support staff via the sections below.

The Academic Leadership team are responsible for planning and implementing the School's range of research and engagement initiatives, as well as developing prospective projects and external links.

    Dean of the School of Public Policy
